entry.title: How Transaction type (field RMVCT) is filled in ACDOCA within whole Accounting processes GL, AP, AR?
entry.content:
After the Brownfield migration to S4 Hana, the information in the Transaction Type field (RMVCT) is not being recorded in the tables. When trying to map the movements for the Group Reporting implementation, we are not finding the Transaction Type information and therefore we are unable to activate Group Reporting.

How the Transaction type (field RMVCT) is filled in ACDOCA within whole Accounting processes GL, AP, AR, MM, SD, etc.) ?

entry.title: Update GL account on Financial Statement Version defined with Functional Areas
entry.content:
Hi All

Good day

I have a FSV setup with Functional areas. I want to move one GL account  from one Functional Area to other.

Could you please let me know where can I do this?

entry.title: CNAB240 Pagamento Santander
entry.content:
Olá,

pessoal estou configurando o layout de pagamento cnab240 do banco santander, estou com dificuldade em encontrar onde customizar a posição no header 33 a 52

Alguém conhece essa customização?

Obrigada,

entry.title: Po Currency Conversion Issue (S4/H
entry.content:
Good morning everyone, 

we are facing a problem into the FI accounting document arising from a MIGO posting.

We've posted a document via MIGO, that has correctly generated an FI document. Problem is coming here because into this document, conversion is not made at the header exchange rate (coming from OB08, TCURR). Seems to be a rounding issue.

I attach some print to explain my problem in details:

This is the document coming from MIGO. As you can see "General Ledger Amount" is 64.010,00 USD, but the "Amount in Local Currency" is 62.160,00 EUR. If we make a calculation: 64.010,00 / 1,0298 = 62.157,70 EUR.

We suspect that our problem comes out during the PO unit price * quantity 

This is our purchasing order, we have a Unit price of 64,01 USD. If we try to convert this price we have:
64,01 / 1,0298 = 62,15770. This value rounded results in 62,16 that multiplied for 1000 (quantity), comes out as 62.160,00 EUR (value in FI document).

We don't want this rounding before multiplication.

Could please someone could help us? 
Thank you so much

entry.title: Transaction REISBDCT error, Field symbol has not been assigned yet.
entry.content: When I call the transaction "REISBDCT - Fixtures/Fittings for Master Data", I get the error Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

entry.title: Clearing date is missing in selection screen for Tcode S_P00_07000134 (FIORI and Back-end system )
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I need your help,

We have two SAP S4 Hana systems, there is one user who has "clearing date" field  when running the tcode S_P00_07000134 on FIORI on SAP system A :

but I don't have it when I run the same Tcode on the SAP system B and even on the SAP System A : 

 

Any idea please why this difference?

 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Getting error while executing FAGLGVTR
entry.content:
Hii teams 

While performing FAGLGVTR, the following error appears.

Diagnosis

The fiscal year change was not performed for company code 1000 as more than two fiscal years are open in Asset Accounting.

Procedure

First carry out a year-end closing for fiscal year 2023 in company code 1000.

When we checked the FAA_CMP, we are unable to change the “highest fiscal year” to 2025. The field is disabled. Kindly advise as to how to execute FAGLGVRT successfully.

entry.title: SAP MDG - whether have any function to validate supporting document such as using OCR
entry.content: In SAP MDG, is there any functionality available to validate the supporting documents against the corresponding change document log? Currently, we are performing this check manually through visual review ('eyeballing'), and we’re exploring if there are any available features or enhancements  that could help streamline or automate this process

entry.title: How can I upload mass vendor invoices, any standard FIORI application or Tcode ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts, need your help please!

How can I upload mass vendor invoices, any standard FIORI application or Tcode please ?
I tried "Upload General Journal Entries" but it doesn't work for vendor invoices, if someone can confirm this please ?

I'm wondering if there an other similar FIORI application for vendor invoices or if there is any workaround solution ?

Thank you in advance,

MEDKHA

entry.title: Archiving suggested for JEST Table- need support
entry.content:
Hello Team,

SAP recommended to plan Archiving for JEST table. 

With reference to recommendation on archiving JEST table, we checked and observed that there are many objects present in JEST table which is connected with different modules (like MM, FICO, etc.)
Please suggest: Which objects in JEST table should we consider?

 

Regards,

BASIS Team.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need assistance in transferring the net book value of Fixed asset
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Could you please provide the process for transferring fixed assets to inventory after capitalizing and calculating depreciation for three years? We now need to transfer the net book value (NBV) to inventory.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to make "Delivery Note" field mandatory in GR/IR (S/4HANA Public Cloud).
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, is there a way to make the "Delivery Note" field (LFSNR) mandatory during Goods Receipt (movement type 101)?
Can this be done via SSCUI, BAdI in Custom Logic App, or any other standard method?
Appreciate any suggestions.
Thanks!

entry.title: Need to change the company code currency (300 FI document already posted)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have set EUR as company code currency, then more that 300 FI documents have been posted in production system. Now the client is asking to change the company code currency to MAD.

Is it technically possible ? If yes how ? and Is it a good idea to do this ? 

Is it better to create a new company code ?

Regards,

entry.title: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – DRIVER6 & allocation weights
entry.content:
Hello SAP-Community,

In the sample End-to-End Planning Process in Integrated Financial Planning for SAP S/4HANA we find the process step “Plan and Allocate Cost Center Expenses” 

Here we can maintain cost center allocation weights. However, when working with my imported data, I get no results.

Upon inspection of the data, this seems to be because the transactional data (facts) in the model SAP_FI_IFP_IM_OPEX never have any value for the measure DRIVER6 nor for any similar measures (e.g. DRIVER1, DRIVER2 etc...)

 

My questions to you are the following:

1. Are these drivers defined in the source system (S4HANA Public Cloud) or somewhere in SAC? If in SAC, where can we define them?

2. Why are these values all null right now?

3. If an import is successfully performed, should all the drivers have defined values or can there be (null) values?

entry.title: BSEG: How to identify Transfer Variant used
entry.content:
Hello All,

Using ABT1N I have posted intercompany asset. In Additional Details Tab, we have transfer varaint.

How to identify in BSEG, for the accounting doc posted using ABT1N which transfer variant was used. I am not able to identify that. 

Can you please help me?

entry.title: BTE for parked document
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a question on BTE for savings of parked document.

I would like to input a certain value at the line item text when I post a parked document at FBV1 transaction.

I believe the substitution won't work for this case, so I decided to use BTE functionality.

I have develeoped a related source code for 'SAMPLE_INTERFACE_00002218' and 'SAMPLE_INTERFACE_00002213'.

The functions are successfully executed when the parked document was saved, but any value is not entered after savings the parked document.

Is there anyone who knows why the BTEs do not work?

Thank you in advance.

BR,

Chris

entry.title: Our customer wants to export entries in entry view, ACDOCA has document splitting,
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our new Chinese company code has a legal requirement to store all the financial data posted in SAP, maintained in Kingdee system (Chinese government system). When we try to build a report, we face issues with entries in ACDOCA (New universal ledger table in S4HANA). ACDOCA storing entries in the document splitting view.

Businesses want only entries in the entry view (Same as BSEG Table), Is there any way we can actually get entry view line items from ACDOCA table without document splitting line items (Like zero balance line item, Split line item). or is there any other table which we can use as BSEG is no longer used in the future in S4HANA.

We also noticed tax line items are split as per profit centre in ACDOCA and amounts appearing differently in the table which is confusing.

Please let us know how do we solve this issue, Please find the attached document for more details

entry.title: How to change company code currency from KHR to USD in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a business requirement of changing our Cambodia company code currency (10) from KHR currency to USD. I understand that the company code currency (10) by default cannot be changed in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

I would like to know, is there any alternate solution or workaround for this?

entry.title: Material Price Based on Posting Date (Material Ledger Active)
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to merge material price based on the posting date into one of the custom report. I checked CKMPCD and it shows Entry Date. Posting Date and Entry Date is different in many cases. I have already checked CKMPCSEARCH.

Thanks,

entry.title: Display the number of installments in the supplier item
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurus,

Is there a standard way for the user to view the value of each installment of a given financing in the supplier's items or in some other application (FIORI)?

Example: $600.00 in 3 installments

$200.00 - installment 1/3 - due 04/25/2025
$200.00 - installment 2/3 - due 05/25/2025
$200.00 - installment 3/3 - due 06/25/2025

 

Regards,

Nali. Patricia
